# Buffalo

> Geotechnical engineering company in United States, providing professional services in soil mechanics, foundation engineering and site investigation.

## Services
- [Bearing Capacity Analysis](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/bearing-capacity-analysis/)
- [Flexible Pavement Design](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/flexible-pavement-design/)
- [Foundations](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/foundations/)
- [Geophysics](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/geophysics/)

- [Geotechnical Road Drainage](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/geotechnical-road-drainage/)
- [Geotextile Specification](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/geotextile-specification/)
- [Ground Improvement](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/ground-improvement/)

- [Preloading Design](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/preloading-design/)
- [Refraction Reflection](https://buffalo.geotechnicalengineering.biz/refraction-reflection/)

## About
This page provides information about geotechnical engineering services available in United States.
The company complies with local and international standards including ASTM, ISO and country-specific norms.
